content_body: The Fallen Timber Lodge was a fantastic house to spend time together with friends. It provided a large living area outside and inside to enjoy visiting with each other. The views are outstanding and can be accessed both inside the home and along the large outside porch area. We had 8 persons sharing the space and it was quite spacious. The amenities in the home were great, we were able to cook/grill dinner with ease. The surrounding area was quiet and the river access was an added bonus. We were also able to enjoy the hot tub and pool table to pass the time together. So many choices to eat and visit in Blue Ridge which are within 15 minute drive from the home.
title: Spacious Blue Ridge Cabin Rental Close to Toccoa River
